_shorthelp: Card displays an information card. Bootstrap.

_footerClass.desc: Classes to apply, separated by spaces. Some possibilties: text-primary, text-secondary,  text-success, text-info, text-warning, text-danger, text-light, text-dark, text-muted,  text-white, text-black-50, text-white-50

_headerClass.desc: Classes to apply, separated by spaces. Some possibilties: text-primary, text-secondary,  text-success, text-info, text-warning, text-danger, text-light, text-dark, text-muted,  text-white, text-black-50, text-white-50

_imageHeight.desc: Vertical height of element. Can be blank, integer, percent, auto or initial.

_imageWidth.desc: Horizontal height of element. Can be blank, integer, percent, auto or initial.

_src.desc: Image. Set to empty for none. Can be .png, gif, bmp or jpg.

_titleStyle.desc: Classes to apply, separated by spaces. Some possibilties: text-primary, text-secondary,  text-success, text-info, text-warning, text-danger, text-light, text-dark, text-muted,  text-white, text-black-50, text-white-50

_subtitleClass.desc: Classes to apply, separated by spaces. Some possibilties: text-primary, text-secondary,  text-success, text-info, text-warning, text-danger, text-light, text-dark, text-muted,  text-white, text-black-50, text-white-50

_textClass.desc: Classes to apply, separated by spaces. Some possibilties: text-primary, text-secondary,  text-success, text-info, text-warning, text-danger, text-light, text-dark, text-muted,  text-white, text-black-50, text-white-50

textValue: This is the text of the Card.
_csstemplate: #{id} {{{if _parent.position<>'static'}position:{_parent.position};{/if}{if display<>''} display:{display};{/if}{if left<>'' and left<>'auto'} left:{left!p};{/if}{if right<>'' and right<>'auto'} right:{right!p};{/if}{if top<>'' and top<>'auto'} top:{top!p};{/if}{if bottom<>'' and bottom<>'auto'} bottom:{bottom!p};{/if}{if height<>'' and height<>'auto'} height:{height!p};{/if}{if width<>'' and width<>'auto'} width:{width!p};{/if}}}
_htmltemplate: {if src<>''} "",{/if}

{if subtitleValue<>''} "
{subtitleValue!j}
",{/if}
